raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Replace the legacy fixed-size thread pool executor with a virtual thread-per-task executor to leverage Java 21's structured concurrency features.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.6.1 to 3.1.4 to align with Java 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
